chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1484 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w Inspector Muhammad Juman Khoso, Inspector Manzoor Ali, Inspector Sohail Jamali and SIP Faheem Hussain Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G Sindh *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang advocate files power on behalf of the complainant, who is also in attendance, which is taken on record. Learned Additional A.G files statements/comments on behalf of respondents No.4 to 7 alongwith photocopies of certain documents including challan and medical certificate(s), which are taken on record. Learned Additional A.G and Assistant P.G submit that this is a injury matter and the case has been challaned by the Investigation Officer, therefore, this petition has become infructuous and liable to be dismissed in view of the dicta laid down by the Supreme Court in the case of Director City Circle GEPCO Ltd and others vs. Shahid Mir and others [PLD 2013 SC 403]. In view of the position of the case, this petition has become infructuous and the same stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
